manifest.name: Default Booking Theme
manifest.description: Reference bundle aligned with the current idx-booking runtime.

copy.pageDescription: Choose services, professionals, and time slots from a single booking flow.
copy.headerSubtitle: Live availability across branches and professionals.
copy.footerDescription: Keep the booking experience fast, clear, and branch-aware from the first click to the confirmation state.
copy.successSubtitle: Your reservation is saved. We also prepared the details for your calendar.

layout.title: Plan your next visit
layout.description: Pick services, professionals, and time slots without leaving the booking flow.

header.title: Studio bookings
header.subtitle: Live availability, branch context, and a clean reset path on mobile.
header.resetDescription: Resetting the flow will discard the current reservation progress.

sidebar.title: Studio bookings
sidebar.subtitle: Keep branch details, opening hours, and claims access visible while the booking flow stays focused.

mobileMenu.title: Studio bookings
mobileMenu.subtitle: The mobile drawer mirrors the operational context from the desktop shell.

hero.title: Book services, professionals, and time slots in one flow
hero.description: Use the host hero to frame the booking state, surface claims access, and keep supporting CTAs close to the active reservation summary.

booking.title: Reservation summary
booking.description: The booking hero and sticky footer stay aligned around the selected services, branch, and next step.

footer.title: Stay inside the booking flow
footer.description: Use the footer card for brand reinforcement, a high-confidence CTA, powered-by disclosure, and the claims link when a claims plugin is active.

success.title: Your visit is confirmed
success.subtitle: The success state summarizes services, timing, pricing, and lets the user create a fresh booking immediately.

claims.title: Submit a claim, complaint, or request
claims.description: Use this page to report an issue related to a booking and keep the follow-up tied to the right location.
claims.successDescription: We received your request and the team will follow up through the contact details you provided.
claims.readOnlyDescription: This page is already visible, but the location still needs a live intake channel before submissions can be sent.

layout.beforeHeader.title: Need to change branch?
layout.beforeHeader.description: Use the branch selector before advancing to professionals and time slots.

booking.hero.after.title: Prefer to talk with the team?
booking.hero.after.description: Reach support before confirming if you need accessibility or schedule guidance.

layout.footer.title: Cancellation window
layout.footer.description: Cancellations can be rescheduled up to 24 hours before the appointment.

booking.success.after.title: Prepare for your visit
booking.success.after.description: Bring your reservation code if the branch team needs to cross-check the booking.

booking.claims.after.title: What happens after submission?
booking.claims.after.description: The team reviews each case and follows up with the same contact details shared in the form.
